feature_evidence.json: Defines feature evidence metadata linking features to relevant frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Lists short descriptions of major frontend files for reference or tooling.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind base styles and OKLCH theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up routes, theme providers, and renders the Design B application shell.
frontend/src/designB/components/DesignBS: Surface wrapper component providing default, elevated, and outlined container styles.
frontend/src/designB/components/DesignBT: Typography components enforcing consistent text hierarchy and styling.
frontend/src/designB/components/ThemeSwi: Toggle switch for changing between default and Design B themes.
frontend/src/designB/data/placeholders.t: Mock user and health data used for demo screens.
frontend/src/designB/layout/DesignBAppSh: Main layout including header, themed content area, tabs, and footer.
frontend/src/designB/layout/DesignBBotto: Mobile bottom navigation bar linking to Home and Profile pages.
frontend/src/designB/storage/themePrefer: LocalStorage helpers for persisting the selected UI theme.
frontend/src/designB/theme.ts: Design B theme definition including palette, fonts, spacing, and radius presets.
frontend/src/designB/themeContext.tsx: Context provider managing Design B theme state and syncing it to the DOM.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to the current Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a placeholder example React Query hook that uses the actor once available.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets global Tailwind styles and theme variables, including light, dark, and custom designB themes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a helper for merging class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/HomeDashboard.tsx: Shows a user's dashboard including quick health summaries and personalized wellness data using mock data.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Renders a profile page showing user details, contact info, medical data, and emergency contacts using Design B components and mock user data.
frontend/src/pages/SignIn.tsx: Implements a sign-in form with email, password, and Internet Identity login, navigating to the home page on submit.
frontend/src/pages/Welcome.tsx: Displays a welcome screen with hero imagery, feature highlights, and navigation buttons to sign in or continue as guest.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with extended colors, fonts, container settings, animations, and plugin usage.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, feature definitions, image requirements, and new feature requests for the Design B UI effort.
